content:
# IBM Carbon Design System - Overview

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

Visual traits:
- structured
- concise
- accessible
- low decoration
- clear field hierarchy

Use when:
- enterprise form
- settings page
- admin workflow
- data submission

Avoid when:
- marketing landing page
- playful consumer onboarding

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Layout Rules

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

- Keep forms short and only ask for information that has clear value.
- Group related controls and use consistent spacing between fields.
- Place submit actions after the fields and keep the primary action visually clear.

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Component Patterns

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

- text input
- text area
- select
- checkbox
- radio
- button
- helper text
- invalid text

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Interaction States

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

- focus
- invalid
- disabled
- helper text
- submit

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Accessibility Notes

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

- Use real form controls with labels and error text tied to fields.
- Keep keyboard flow linear and predictable.

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Implementation Hints

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, settings page, admin workflow, data submission
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/components/form/usage/

- Use for serious enterprise forms where clarity beats visual flourish.
- Represent validation and error states in code from the first version.
- Avoid collecting optional fields unless they improve the task outcome.

AI summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.
